creator: Nacer Amrouch
body:
Salam,

  • Conversion tracking was misconfigured. Hamdan fixed today: now tracking calls longer than 1 minute as conversions. Previous data missing because the conversion event was wrong.
  • Volume snapshot: 30 calls all-time, 8 calls last 7 days, $122 spent in last 7 days, ~$400 spent in last 30 days.
  • Top performing keywords: Life Alert system, Life Alert emergency response, personal emergency medical response. Continue investing on these.
  • 11 calls visible at the ad group keyword level but account level total is higher. Either dashboard glitch or other keywords / campaigns are contributing too. Reconcile and report back.
  • Once Hashir updates the start page CTA ("Start Now" to "Call Now", see Website Fixes on Dev side), confirm the Google Ads destination URL still points to the right page.
  • Pull a keyword report at the 14 day mark now that tracking is correct. Identify which terms drive >1min calls vs which drop off, and reweight bids accordingly.
@Ads Team

creator: Ads Team
body:
﻿Salam @Nacer Amrouch﻿ ﻿@Sohib Boundaoui﻿﻿ ﻿﻿﻿

Quick update on the LifeRun Google Ads campaign:

﻿

So far, we have generated 22 calls with a total ad spend of $284. Although this is a search campaign, we are primarily analyzing the performance based on phone calls, as we previously discussed and concluded that this product is more likely to convert through direct calls.

﻿

At this stage, it would be very helpful if you could share feedback regarding the quality of the calls and whether there have been any conversions so far. This information will help us further optimize and scale the campaign effectively.

﻿

creator: Nacer Amrouch
body:
Salam,

  • Meta Ads update. 27 calls last 7 days, ~100 all-time. One video creative is carrying almost all the lead volume on the 30 day window.
  • Do not scale yet. Holding the scaling decision until the client confirms whether these calls are actually converting to customers. A lot of the inbound is "is this covered by Medicaid", which is a qualification problem.
  • If client confirms ROI: scale +20% every 24 to 48 hours, ask for the max budget cap.
  • If client says ROI mixed: duplicate the campaign (turn off underperformers in the duplicate, keep current running) and run parallel creative testing on the duplicate. Existing winning creative stays untouched.
  • Consider new creative messaging that explicitly states "not covered by Medicaid" to filter Medicaid only callers earlier in the funnel. Naz and Sohib to drive copy direction once we get the client conversion data.
@Ads Team @Khurram Jamil

creator: Ads Team
body:
﻿Salam guys, @Nacer Amrouch﻿ ﻿@Sohib Boundaoui
﻿﻿﻿ ﻿﻿﻿﻿

Quick update on the LifeRun Meta ads campaign:

﻿

Since launching the call campaigns, we have generated 66 calls so far. The overall ad spend on this campaign is currently $321, resulting in an average cost per call of $4.87.

The campaign is performing well, and we are seeing an increase in results while maintaining the same ad spend, which is a positive sign for scalability and optimization.

The average call duration is currently 1 minute and 2 seconds, and the overall CTR is almost touching 4%, indicating strong engagement from the audience.

We would also appreciate your feedback regarding the quality of the calls and whether there have been any conversions from these leads so far. This will help us further optimize the campaign performance moving forward.

﻿




﻿

creator: Nacer Amrouch
body:
Salam,



  • CPL is at $400. Sohib flagged May 20. Six new static graphics were added but the issue needs a proper diagnosis before more creative testing.

  • Pull a full campaign breakdown: CPL by ad set, audience, placement, and creative. Identify exactly where the $400 is coming from before making changes.

  • Check for audience overlap and bidding cannibalization. Vous targets a narrow demographic. If ad sets are competing against each other, consolidate before scaling.

  • Test the 6 new static graphics Sohib added in an isolated ad set with a controlled budget. Do not fold them into existing ad sets yet.

  • Verify the landing page is converting. Website form redirect was marked Done May 14. Run a live form submission now and confirm it lands in GHL correctly.

  • Report back with a CPL breakdown and a specific action list, not a general update. Include the numbers, what changed, and what the expected impact is.

@Ads Team

creator: Nacer Amrouch
body:
Salam,



  • Quality HVAC already runs Google LSAs. Our role is consultant, not full takeover. Audit the existing setup and surface tuning opportunities. The previous Google Ads team set it up and left, so it likely needs cleanup.

  • Apply ad scheduling: M-F 9am to 5pm CST. Off Saturdays and Sundays. Match the customer service hours so paid leads are not unanswered.

  • Track call quality via the Google Ads call tracking. We cannot see the caller phone number, just the call durations. Three-tier call duration buckets idea from Khurram: 3 to 5 seconds, 30 seconds, 5 minutes plus. Five plus minute calls are the real intent leads.

  • Report weekly via Monday with call counts per duration tier. Tag Nacer in the report.

  • Focus current effort on launching the Google Ads we are starting and refining the Meta side. The LSA tuning is secondary once the new tracking is live.

@Ads Team﻿﻿

creator: Nacer Amrouch
body:
Salam,



  • Done state: Zoho automation fires the moment a CROA lead status changes to a converted case, and that lead's identifiers (email and phone at minimum) get auto pushed into the Meta custom audience maintained for the CROA retargeting layer. The list grows automatically on every conversion, no manual export.

  • Trigger: Zoho workflow on the JCL Justice Consumer Law account, filter on practice area equals CROA and stage transitions from lead to case. Use whatever native Zoho automation primitive fits (webhook out, native Zoho CRM workflow, or a flow tool already in the stack). Confirm with Naz which integration path is the cleanest before building.

  • Payload to Meta: email plus phone are the highest match rate fields. Send hashed per Meta's custom audience API requirements. Optionally first name, last name, city, state if Zoho has them populated, since multiple match keys raise audience match rate.

  • Target audience: the same Meta custom audience built from Andrew's seed export. Reference the CROA Retargeting Seed subitem on the Ads board for the audience identifier once it is live.

  • Status: Stuck, blocked on prerequisite. The Meta custom audience must exist before the automation has a target to push into. Cannot start build until the seed list lands and the Ads team uploads it.

  • Alignment note: coordinate the trigger field with the lead source cleanup work happening under Organic Tracking Review, so the attribution stays consistent end to end. We do not want a case in Zoho counted as CROA here but Organic elsewhere.

@Muhammad Hashir Faiz @Zayan Faiz

creator: Nacer Amrouch
body:
Salam,



  • Escalation: email deliverability fix for Healing Helps has no documented progress.

  • Hashir, what is the status? Is SPF/DKIM configured? Have test emails been sent and verified?

  • Need a completion confirmation this week.

@Muhammad Hashir Faiz @Zayan Faiz

creator: Nacer Amrouch
body:
Salam,

  • Client Waseem K reported on May 18 that recipients are saying his emails are landing in spam. We need to fix deliverability before this hurts the organic momentum we are building for Healing Helps.
  • Confirm the email hosting setup. Where is Waseem's email hosted, what is the sending domain, and what platform sends his outbound mail (Workspace, M365, Klaviyo, GHL, other).
  • Audit DNS records on the sending domain. Pull current SPF, DKIM, and DMARC. Note any provider that is not in the SPF include list and any DKIM selectors that are missing or unsigned.
  • Fix what is missing or misconfigured. Get a clean SPF, signed DKIM for every sender, and a published DMARC record. Move DMARC to enforced policy where appropriate (start at p=none with rua reporting if you need a warm up window).
  • Check sender reputation on Google Postmaster Tools and Microsoft SNDS if applicable. Flag if domain or IP reputation is bad.
  • Run inbox placement tests by sending from Waseem's address to Gmail, Outlook, and Yahoo accounts. Verify primary inbox placement, not Promotions or Spam.
  • Report back with a short before vs after writeup, recommended ongoing maintenance, and anything that needs a client action.
  • Timeline: May 21 to May 26.
@Muhammad Hashir Faiz
